---
title: "Exercise 5: Univariate Optimization"
subtitle: "[Optimization in Machine Learning](https://slds-lmu.github.io/website_optimization/)"
notebook-view: false
---

::: {.content-hidden when-format="pdf"}
::: {.hidden}
{{< include ../_quarto/latex-math.qmd >}}
:::
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Reproducibility

Produced with Python 3.10 and R 4.4.1. To reproduce, install the pinned package versions below.

::: {.panel-tabset}
### Python
```bash
pip install numpy==2.0.2 matplotlib==3.10.8
```
### R
```r
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_version("ggplot2", "3.5.1")
```
:::
:::

INSERT_setup_intro

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R
{{< embed sol_uv_opt_1_R.ipynb#setup_data echo=true >}}
### Python
{{< embed sol_uv_opt_1_py.ipynb#setup_data echo=true >}}
:::

INSERT_seeds_note

INSERT_problem_intro

INSERT_problem_a

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
**Solution.**

INSERT_solution_a_text
:::

INSERT_problem_b

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
**Solution.**

INSERT_solution_b_text
:::

INSERT_problem_c

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
**Solution.**

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R
{{< embed sol_uv_opt_1_R.ipynb#solution_c_code echo=true >}}
### Python
{{< embed sol_uv_opt_1_py.ipynb#solution_c_code echo=true >}}
:::
:::

INSERT_problem_d

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
**Solution.**

INSERT_solution_d_text
:::

INSERT_problem_e

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
INSERT_brent_intro_note

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R
{{< embed sol_uv_opt_1_R.ipynb#solution_e_code echo=true >}}
### Python
{{< embed sol_uv_opt_1_py.ipynb#solution_e_code echo=true >}}
:::

INSERT_brent_cost_note
:::

INSERT_problem_f

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
INSERT_cd_link_note

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R
{{< embed sol_uv_opt_1_R.ipynb#solution_f_code echo=true >}}
### Python
{{< embed sol_uv_opt_1_py.ipynb#solution_f_code echo=true >}}
:::
:::

INSERT_problem_g

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
**Solution.**

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R
{{< embed sol_uv_opt_1_R.ipynb#solution_g_code echo=true >}}
### Python
{{< embed sol_uv_opt_1_py.ipynb#solution_g_code echo=true >}}
:::

INSERT_solution_g_text
:::
